title: Trans-Australian Railway - Wikipedia
content:

| :--- | :--- |
| **Total Length** | 478.193 kilometres (297.135 miles) |

| **Western End Relative Location** | Between Loongana and Nurina |
| **Eastern End Mileage** | 496 miles |
| **Eastern End Relative Location** | Between Ooldea and Watson |

*   **Exact coordinates for Loongana station:** Not provided in the page.

### Available Geographic and Positional Data

*   **General Page Coordinates:** 32°28′02″S 137°46′00″E (32.46709079°S 137.76673101°E)
*   **Total Line Length (as constructed):** 1051.73 mi (1692.60 km)
*   **Total Line Length (standard gauge):** 1691 kilometres (1051 miles)
*   **Route Distance (1909 survey):** 1,063 miles (1,711 km)
*   **Port Pirie to Port Augusta Extension:** 90 kilometres (56 miles)
*   **Redhill to Port Pirie Extension:** 47 km (29 mi)
*   **Indirect Narrow-Gauge Connection (Adelaide):** 290 kilometres (180 miles)
*   **Sydney–Perth Rail Corridor Total Length:** 4352 kilometres (2704 miles)
